channel.title: Flagrant System Error
channel.description: Technical musings from Jay Kint, a developer of little renown.

item.title: Content Goes Here
item.description: Welcome to flagrantsystemerror.com. This is the inaugural post.
item.author: jkint@flagrantsystemerror.com (Jay Kint)

item.title: iPad Blog Post Workflow
item.description: I've long wanted to be able to author my blog completely on my iPad. Now with the help of a new app, I can do so. This is my workflow and how this post came to fruition.
item.author: jkint@flagrantsystemerror.com (Jay Kint)

item.title: Goodbye Emacs, Hello Sublime Text 2
item.description: This all starts with a search for a good full screen editing experience.
item.author: jkint@flagrantsystemerror.com (Jay Kint)

item.title: The Microsoft Wedge Keyboard is a nice companion to any tablet.
item.description: The Microsoft Wedge Keyboard is a nice companion to any tablet.
item.author: jkint@flagrantsystemerror.com (Jay Kint)
